findings.title: Dynamic sampler flag transaction is untested
findings.impact: The new dynamic update path validates sampler flags as a batch, mutates the process gflags, rolls back on failure, and passes explicit-state bits into LogSampler. The diff only changes flags_test.cpp formatting and exercises sampler config directly, so regressions in Flags::UpdateFlagParameter, unchanged-value explicit marking, multi-flag derivation blocking, or rollback after a bad dynamic update would not be caught.
findings.fix: Add Flags-layer unit tests that call UpdateFlagParameter with request/access/diagnostic sample-rate maps and assert both FLAGS_* values and LogSampler snapshot ppm values. Cover request-only derivation, explicit access_sample_rate=1.0 blocking derivation, mixed sampler/non-sampler updates, and an invalid batch preserving the previous gflags and sampler snapshot.
